title: Nonsense Collection
description: Grow overworld mobs with new crops, and enjoy music discs completely unrelated to the crops
body:
**Nonsense Collection** is a mod including 19 Overworld "mob crops" capable of "growing" mobs for sustainable, renewable ~~slaughtering~~ farming. All crops are obtainable through the Creative menu and crafting. Mobs with no on kill drops/drops obtainable from other methods are not included.

![A colourful array of seed packets, themed after various overworld mob spawn eggs. They are displayed in the Creative mode inventory under the subheading "Creature Cultivation".](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/165b9fc356e1cd45107bb12849eac7d5ba165ac5.png)

4 music discs obtainable from creepers and 4 music discs found elsewhere are also included.

![8 music discs of various colours displayed in the Creative mode inventory under the subheading "Nonsense Collection Discs".](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f7495d3d528508d537d2040464a21ef73752dc9.png)

**Disc 9 not shown. It's a secret! Spoilers in the changelog.**

_Not compatible with:_
- Any right-click-harvest-style mod. Crops only work when broken by hand.
